title: malleastrum rakotozafyi
intro: Malleastrum rakotozafyi is a plant species endemic to Madagascar, belonging to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has been studied for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Malleastrum rakotozafyi include its potential use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, and its ability to reduce fever. Herbal preparations of the plant have been traditionally used in Madagascar, often in the form of tea or infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal applications.
